name: Ryu-Ge War Zone
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>登</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>紋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: Take 1 Dinosaur, 1 Sea Serpent, and 1 Wyrm monster from your Deck, add 1 to your hand, banish 1, and send 1 to the GY, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Dragon, Dinosaur, Sea Serpent, or Wyrm monsters. If you have "Sosei Ryu-Ge Mistva" in your Extra Deck face-up: You can Special Summon 3 "Ryu-Ge" monsters with different Types, 1 each from your Deck, GY, and banishment. You can only use each effect of "Ryu-Ge War Zone" once per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: Take 1 Dinosaur, 1 Sea Serpent, and 1 Wyrm monster from your Deck, add 1 to your hand, banish 1, and send 1 to the GY, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Dragon, Dinosaur, Sea Serpent, or Wyrm monsters. If you have "Sosei Ryu-Ge Mistva" in your Extra Deck face-up: You can Special Summon 3 "Ryu-Ge" monsters with different Types, 1 each from your Deck, GY, and banishment. You can only use each effect of "Ryu-Ge War Zone" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
Special Summons the player's banished monsters
